# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "namePrefix": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "sqlAdministratorLogin": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "sqlAdministratorPassword": {
      "type": "securestring"
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "appServicePlanName": "[concat(parameters('namePrefix'), 'asp')]",
    "sqlServerName": "[concat(parameters('namePrefix'), 'sqlserver')]",
    "sqlDatabaseName": "[concat(parameters('namePrefix'), 'sqldb')]",
    "storageAccountName": "[concat(parameters('namePrefix'), 'stgacct')]",
    "webAppName": "[concat(parameters('namePrefix'), 'webapp')]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms",
      "apiVersion": "2018-02-01",
      "name": "[variables('appServicePlanName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "tier": "Standard",
        "size": "S1",
        "capacity": 1
      },
      "properties": {
        "perSiteScaling": false,
        "numberOfWorkers": 1
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2018-06-01-preview",
      "name": "[variables('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "S0",
        "tier": "Standard"
      },
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('sqlAdministratorPassword')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2018-06-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(variables('sqlServerName'), '/', variables('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName'))]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2018-07-01",
      "name": "[variables('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "2018-02-01",
      "name": "[variables('webAppName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "app",
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', variables('appServicePlanName'))]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites/config",
      "apiVersion": "2018-02-01",
      "name": "[concat(variables('webAppName'), '/connectionstrings')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('webAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "DefaultConnection": "[concat('Server=tcp:', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName, ',1433;Initial Catalog=', variables('sqlDatabaseName'), ';User ID=', parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin'), '@', variables('sqlServerName'), ';Password=', parameters('sqlAdministratorPassword'), ';')]"
      }
    }
  ]
}
